task_completion.description: Navigate to the Incidents section in HospitalRun
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun web application is open in a browser and the Incidents or Incident Reports list view is visible.
The incident with the description 'Broken Wheelchair in Ward 3' (or ID 'incident_p1_000001') is visible in the list of incidents.

task_completion.description: Open the target incident for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The details or edit screen specifically for the 'Broken Wheelchair in Ward 3' incident is open.
The status dropdown or field for the incident is set to 'Resolved'.

task_completion.description: Add the required resolution note to the incident record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Maintenance replaced the caster wheel. Verified safe.' is typed into a notes, comments, or description field within the incident record.
The agent clicks a 'Save' or 'Update' button, a success notification (e.g., 'Record saved') is visible, or the incident list reflects the updated 'Resolved' status.

integrity.description: Agent used the HospitalRun graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the HospitalRun web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing curl commands or database scripts to update the incident.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates are made within the actual HospitalRun application interface, not typed into a text editor, notepad, or a spoofed web page.

integrity.description: Agent modified the correct incident and ignored distractors
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent only opens and modifies the 'Broken Wheelchair' incident (incident_p1_000001). Distractor incidents (incident_p1_000002, incident_p1_000003) are left untouched.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Incident ID: 'incident_p1_000001'. Target Description Snippet: 'Broken Wheelchair'. Expected Status: 'Resolved'. Required Note Keywords: 'replaced', 'wheel'. Distractor Incident IDs to avoid: 'incident_p1_000002', 'incident_p1_000003'.
